prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG cyberpunk world atlas map, first batch pass, landscape orientation
Primary request: Shadowrun / Sixth World inspired cyberpunk urban-fantasy map, diverse archipelago terrain type.
Scene/backdrop: overhead birds-eye neon cartographic view of a vast dark ocean filled with many urbanized island groups, microcontinents, and matrix-linked corporate zones.
Subject: diverse archipelago layout with uneven island distribution across a broad ocean: several large sprawl islands, microcontinents, tiny smuggling islets, curved island arcs, lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote atolls, volcanic islands, fragmented industrial coasts, corporate black-site islands, awakened forest islands, barrens slum islands, desert island, tundra island, mountain island, matrix hub islands, and hidden shamanic preserves.
Style/medium: cyberpunk city-district map expanded to archipelago scale, matrix overlay hexagons, neon highlights on dark atlas, rain-slick dystopian cartography, high-detail illustrated RPG sourcebook map.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 landscape, no single dominant mainland, island groups sweep in organic arcs and clusters, full archipelago visible with dark ocean border.
Lighting/mood: neon-soaked corporate dystopia with street magic, perpetual night, rain haze, corporate surveillance, deniable operations, smuggling and data-heist tension.
Color palette: black and charcoal base, neon cyan, magenta, acid green, amber hazard lights, deep blue ocean, muted biome colors under glowing overlays.
Materials/textures: wet asphalt sheen, holographic matrix grid, engraved ink coastlines, digital scan lines, detailed waves and harbor lights.
Constraints: no text labels, no letters, no readable words, no legend, no compass text, no watermark, no UI, no characters or portraits. Avoid grid-like spacing and avoid identical island shapes.
